description: CompositionPink sleeveless round neck top made of 100% cotton with pink and silver rosette details along the necklineFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours in a gentle cycleDo not bleach or wringTumble dry low or lay flat to dryMedium heat steam iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry in sunlightdoodle went all out girly on this pink top with the rosette adornments on the neck.
